## How to Test
```bash
# Command to manually verify the change
python main_v2.py build-all --as-of YYYY-MM-DD
```

## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded tickers, dates, or API keys
- [ ] Code follows the project's style (Black, line length 100)
